data.body:
[10/21(Tue) Ban Notice - Grand Assault]

We have taken disciplinary actions against the players who were abusing in-game system in Grand Assault.

The following players have been banned, and their rankings have been deleted for exploiting and abusing the in-game system under our service policies.

Total number of players banned: 24
Period of Restriction: Permanent
* Removed from the leaderboard.

▶ Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3220&thread=3190459
